# Integration Fixture Sources

These files are realistic public samples used for integration tests.

- `realistic_report.pdf` ← https://www.orimi.com/pdf-test.pdf
- `mountain_scene.jpg` ← https://images.pexels.com/photos/1525039/pexels-photo-1525039.jpeg
- `knowledge_base.md` ← https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pandas-dev/pandas/main/README.md
- `countries.csv` ← https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cs109/2014_data/master/countries.csv
- `pride_and_prejudice_excerpt.txt` ← https://www.gutenberg.org/files/1342/1342-0.txt

These fixtures are intentionally varied and non-trivial so semantic extraction tests exercise realistic payloads and metadata paths.
